title: 目標達成の後に・挑めカワイイの冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan hosts a holiday meetup with her
fans, Seeing the great turnout, Curren Chan really
starts to feel her popularity increasing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, on the way home, we see people raving
about the runner who won this year's Japanese
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes again that running well is the best
way to show off her cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Striving for the Triple Tiara, Curren Chan aims for
the Fillies' Revue next, a race that's a little longer
than the distance she's best at.
